'''Santo''' was a [[Imperial commandoes|commando]] in Second [[Platoon/Legends|Platoon]], B Company of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Imperial Special Operations|Special Operations]] group [[Ghost Battalion]].

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he participated in the [[Subjugation of Sulon]] and his team under [[First Lieutenant/Legends|First Lieutenant]] [[Brazack]] stormed into the [[Katarn family compound|Katarn homestead]] with orders to capture [[Morgan Katarn]]. With [[Koyo]] opened the doors to the workshop, triggering a defensive reaction of the home droid [[WeeGee]]. The commandos neutralized it with an [[antipersonnel grenade]], and then Santo muted it by putting a beam through its [[Speaker/Legends|speaker]] grill.

As at that time their target was out, Morgan witnessed the intrusion safely from afar. The team returned to [[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|their base]] empty-handed.
